name: Thyme Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon dried orange peel, soaked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Combine butter and 1-1/2 cups sugar in a bowl. Beat with a mixer until well blended.
3. Add eggs, beating until smooth. Mix in thyme, orange peel, flour, and baking powder until combined.
4. In a shallow bowl, sprinkle the remaining 1/4 cup sugar.
5. Shape dough into 3/4-inch balls (dough can be chilled to make this step easier).
6. Roll each ball in the sugar mixture, then place on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 375 degrees F. for 12-15 minutes, or until edges are browned.
8. Remove from the baking sheet and allow to cool on racks.
Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
